name: glb-pcf-editor
description: Domain-agnostic 2.5D engineering viewer. Piping domain ships day one.

scripts.test: cd tests && npx playwright test --config playwright.config.js
scripts.test:phase1: cd tests && npx playwright test phase1-pcf-parse.test.js --config playwright.config.js --headed
scripts.test:phase2: cd tests && npx playwright test phase2-scene-renderer.test.js --config playwright.config.js --headed
scripts.test:phase3: cd tests && npx playwright test phase3-drafting-geometry.test.js --config playwright.config.js --headed
scripts.test:phase4: cd tests && npx playwright test phase4-support-symbols.test.js --config playwright.config.js --headed
scripts.test:phase5: cd tests && npx playwright test phase5-component-panel.test.js --config playwright.config.js --headed
scripts.test:phase6: cd tests && npx playwright test phase6-css2d-labels.test.js --config playwright.config.js --headed
scripts.test:phase7: cd tests && npx playwright test phase7-heatmap.test.js --config playwright.config.js --headed
scripts.test:phase8: cd tests && npx playwright test phase8-debug-tab.test.js --config playwright.config.js --headed
scripts.test:phase9: cd tests && npx playwright test phase9-glb-export.test.js --config playwright.config.js --headed
scripts.test:phase10: cd tests && npx playwright test phase10-dxf.test.js --config playwright.config.js --headed
